data.title: Mopar offers wide range of gift ideas for automotive enthusiasts; includes apparel, merchandise, accessories, and parts.
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan on December 4, 2025, a diverse selection of Mopar apparel, branded products, accessories, and performance parts is now accessible for all automotive enthusiasts. Mopar simplifies holiday shopping for car lovers by offering a vast selection of gift options, catering to various preferences. This selection includes an assortment of products suitable for any automotive enthusiast, providing gift ideas for those interested in automotive-related items.

data.title: Investigation launched into Klarna (KLAR) over 102% spike in credit loss provision risk tied to fair financing growth.
data.description: Investigator Reed Kathrein is currently examining allegations regarding possible misrepresentation by management of Klarna Group plc's provision trends and lending risk. The investigation, launched by shareholder rights firm Hagens Berman based in San Francisco, is looking into potential securities law violations by Klarna Group plc. The probe aims to assess if there were any discrepancies in the company's disclosures related to provision trends and lending risk. This investigation was initiated on December 4, 2025.

data.title: CarbonZero.Eco launches biochar plant and secures carbon credit deal with Climeworks, advancing regenerative agriculture.
data.description: In Colusa County, California, on December 4, 2025, CarbonZero.Eco, a climate technology startup from Silicon Valley, revealed the opening of its initial commercial biochar production facility. The company, funded by venture capitalists, specializes in regenerative agriculture and carbon removal via biochar.

data.title: Global 4D Printing in Healthcare market expected to reach USD 14240M by 2034 at 84.6% CAGR, starting from USD 19M in 2024.
data.description: The article discusses the growing market for 4D printing in healthcare, highlighting its potential in biomedical engineering, personalized medicine, and the integration of smart materials and biocompatible polymers. The market size was approximately USD 19 million in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 25 million in 2025, with a projected value of around USD 14,240 million by 2034 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 84.6%. Key trends include advancements in smart materials, personalized and regenerative medicine, and the integration of artificial intelligence in design optimization. The report covers various components, technologies, applications, end-users, and regions in the market. The use of 4D printing is expected to revolutionize the healthcare industry by providing innovative solutions that adapt to patient-specific needs, improving surgical precision, organ replacement, and overall clinical outcomes.

data.title: EV finance transactions increase as EV tax credit ends in Q3 2025, according to Experian Automotive data.
data.description: In Schaumburg, Illinois, there was a surge in EV finance transactions in the third quarter of 2025 as the EV tax credit was set to expire at the end of September. The market experienced a notable rise in the number of transactions involving electric vehicles due to this impending deadline.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer introduces Advanced Compounding module for Simplifi 797, aiding complex pharmacies with USP 797 compliance.
data.description: A new Advanced Compounding module has been introduced by Wolters Kluwer Health in Waltham, Mass. The module is designed for Simplifi 797 and aims to assist pharmacies in meeting the 2023 USP Chapter 797 requirements. This solution offers comprehensive support for various compounding needs, including high-risk sterile processes, advanced batch tracking, and beyond-use dating. By providing an all-in-one closed-loop system, pharmacies can effectively manage complex compounding tasks. The module is accompanied by enhanced documentation and educational resources to promote adherence to industry best practices outlined in USP Chapter 797.

data.title: EU's plan aims to enhance ESMA's oversight in cryptocurrency and capital markets. Proposal for "European SEC" laid in 2023.
data.description: Two years prior to the recent official proposal, ECB President Christine Lagarde suggested the establishment of a European equivalent of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in 2023. The aim is to broaden the supervisory powers of the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) in the region.

data.title: SHP Physics teacher Riaz Abdulla wins University of Chicago Outstanding Educator Award in 2025. #EducationExcellence
data.description: In Atherton, California, on December 4, 2025, Riaz Abdulla, a Physics teacher at Sacred Heart Preparatory (SHP), has been announced as one of the recipients of the 2025 University of Chicago (UChicago) Outstanding Educator Award. This prestigious award is bestowed upon exceptional teachers who have made a significant impact on the education sector. Abdulla's dedication to teaching Physics at SHP has garnered him this recognition, highlighting his commitment to students' academic development. This accolade reinforces his stature as an influential educator shaping future generations.

data.title: Hightekers buys Serviap Global, enhancing global EOR services. News from London and Mexico City on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in London and Mexico City, Hightekers, a worldwide company offering Employer of Record (EOR), payroll, freelancer, and contractor management solutions, revealed the purchase of Serviap Global. Serviap Global, a prominent provider of EOR and contractor management services in Latin America, is now under Hightekers' umbrella. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry and consolidates Hightekers' position as a key player in the sector. The exact financial details of the deal, including the acquisition cost and other specifics, were not disclosed to the public.

data.title: Quantiphi named in Inc.'s 2025 Best in Business List in 3 categories: AI Implementation, Established Excellence, and Extra.
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts on December 4, 2025, Quantiphi, a company focused on AI technology, revealed its inclusion in Inc.'s 2025 Best in Business lineup. The company achieved recognition in three distinct categories: Best AI Implementation, Established Excellence (5-14 Years in Business), and one other category.

data.title: ARCO Design/Build starts construction on 147,385 sq ft self-storage in Fort Lauderdale for 4 Rivers Property Group and Crow Holdings.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on December 4, 2025, ARCO Design/Build, a top design-build general contractor, began construction on a 147,385-square-foot self-storage project for 4 Rivers Property Group and Crow Holdings. The development is located at 1400 Progresso Drive.

data.title: BAE Systems introduces OneArc, a defense technology innovator offering products in training, simulation, analytics.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, BAE Systems, Inc. (LON: BA) from McLean, Virginia introduced BAE Systems OneArc (OneArc™), a new entity focused on defense technology innovation. OneArc will specialize in providing commercial products and solutions in various areas such as synthetic training, simulation, interoperability, geospatial services, data analytics, and more.

data.title: Curry County in rural New Mexico adopts solar power to reduce emissions & save taxpayer money with Solstice Power.
data.description: Ten years ago, it may have seemed far-fetched that a few municipal buildings in rural New Mexico could significantly reduce emissions and save taxpayer money. Now, Solstice Power Technologies LLC is making this a reality by leading the way in implementing sustainable practices. The company is helping to cut emissions from these buildings in Clovis, N.M., and save taxpayer dollars in the process.

data.title: Energy Vault enters Swiss market with FlexGrid Product for 2-25 MW applications, secures contracts with Schindler & Energie Wettingen.
data.description: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. revealed its debut in the Swiss market with the introduction of FlexGrid, a specialized product for C&I customers. This offering is based on a fresh setup of its B-VAULT battery energy storage system (BESS) platform, tailored for industrial, commercial, and small-utility applications ranging from 2 to 25 MW. The company, known as a key player in grid-scale energy storage solutions, made this announcement highlighting their formal entry into Switzerland through the FlexGrid launch.

data.title: SearchStax ranked #1 in G2’s Site Search category for Winter 2026, marking its second consecutive win with top placements across Enterprise and Momentum grids.
data.description: In the Winter 2026 Reports by G2, SearchStax in Los Angeles maintained its strong performance by securing leading positions in various Site Search categories such as Enterprise and Momentum. The company's impressive showing signifies its growing prominence in the market.

data.title: Kern Community College District partners with Dreamscape Learn to provide mobile VR classroom for STEM education.
data.description: KCCD has revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with Dreamscape Learn to offer state-of-the-art interactive learning experiences at colleges in the Bakersfield district. This news was announced on December 4, 2025. The partnership aims to bring immersive educational opportunities to students while on the move.

data.title: SpecterOps partners with Tines, integrate BloodHound for Attack Path Management; automation, AI, human decision-making key.
data.description: A collaboration has been unveiled between SpecterOps, renowned for BloodHound and the innovation of Attack Path Management, and Tines, a leading figure in intelligent workflows. This partnership marks the integration of BloodHound into Tines, offering clients the opportunity to effectively implement Attack Path Management using intelligent workflows merging automation, AI, and human judgment. Augmenting SpecterOps' Attack Path Management capabilities, this partnership is set to reshape the sector.
